spec.name: Soul Transform Sphere
spec.summary: reconfigures soul energy in a spherical envelope with active regulation while it runs
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that reconfigures soul energy in a spherical envelope with active regulation while it runs. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: permanent.
